calendar.matters:
NOTICE OF HEARING AND TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE)
Off Calendar Nov-25-2009 Off Calendar

AMENDED NOTICE OF HEARING AND TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE)
Off Calendar Nov-25-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Elder Adult Abuse TRO hearing this day.
Dept. 204, Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Arlene Howell/CSR#2542, Bailiff: J. Capozzoli.
Plaintiff: Virginia S. Torrente, present in pro per.
Defendant: Sadaisha Shimmers, present in pro per.
The Court hears testimony, receives evidence and after hearing the evidence presented, the Plaintiff's order is Granted as follows: Defendant shall stay at least 100 yards away from the protected person: Virginia S. Torrente.
Stay-away 3 yards at the shared residence.
Defendant shall not Harass, Attack, Strike, Threaten, Assault (sexually or otherwise), Hit, Follow, Stalk, Destroy Personal Property, Keep under Surveillance, or Block Movements, Contact (directly or indirectly), Telephone, Send Messages, Mail or e-Mail, Take Any Action, Directly or Through Others, to Obtain the Addresses or Locations of the Protected Persons.
Expires Nov. 24, 2012
Order signed in open court.

Application And Declaration For Ex Parte Hearing
Off Calendar Nov-17-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Virginia Torrente in Propria Persona. Sadaisha Shimmers in Propria Persona. Eduardo Torrente also present. Alaysia Henry also present.

The Court heard oral argument and ruled as follows: 1)The request to advance the November 25, 2009 hearing date was denied. 2)The temporary restraining order was modified as follows: The move out order is no longer in effect. The 100 yard stay away remains in place with the addition of a 3 yard stay away while both Parties are at the residence located at 278 Raymond Ave., S.F. 3)The personal conduct/no contact order also remains in effect. The Amended Notice of Hearing and Temporary Restraining Order was signed in open court. (see order for full terms)

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/ Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.
